systemStatus.headline: Sun Jul 19, 4 AM run. WORLD CUP FINAL IS TODAY and the 'World Cup HQ 2026' campaign ($20/day) is STILL PAUSED -- 2 confirmed 11:00 AM parties already on the books (10 guests), one explicitly for the Final. Toast Sat Jul 18 summary and the Sling Jul 19 schedule both land ~7 AM, after this run: sales and staffing below are LAST KNOWN (Fri Jul 17 / Sat Jul 18), not yesterday's actuals. Reviews: 1 unreplied (Thuy Anh Le, The Brewhouse); Brewhouse Coffee clean at 0.
systemStatus.detail:
Sun Jul 19 04:00 AM PT run.

TIMING: This is the 4 AM cycle. Toast's Sat Jul 18 Daily Performance Summary arrives ~7:39 AM and Sling's Jul 19 schedule ~7:00 AM -- neither existed at run time. Sales and staffing below are LAST KNOWN, not yesterday's actuals.

TOAST (last known, Fri Jul 17, group-level): net $7,074.87 / gross $7,274.25 / 282 guests / 163 orders / avg guest $25.09 / avg order $43.40 / labor 16.7%. vs SDLW Fri Jul 10: net -1.6%, gross -0.6%, guests -2.4%, orders -7.9%. Unchanged from the Sat Jul 18 run.

SLING (last known, Sat Jul 18): 13 staff / 14 shifts / 76.98 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT. Malformed 24-hr shift entries persist -- Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:31A-4:31A and Julianna Ornelas (Barista) 6:33A-6:33A; Julianna also double-booked Barista AM + Runner 1:30-5P. Schedule-template issue, not one employee's record.

REVIEWS: No new Google Business or SpotHopper review notifications since the Sat Jul 18 live scrape. Carrying that state forward: THE BREWHOUSE 4.5 stars / 517 reviews, ONE unreplied (Thuy Anh Le, 5-star photo-only, Jul 17, 4 photos). BREWHOUSE COFFEE 5.0 stars / 2 reviews, ZERO unreplied. Direct load of the Unreplied tabs did not render this run (Google served the search-embedded merchant view), so this is carried and delta-checked against email, not re-scraped.

GOOGLE ADS: 2 report emails in 24h (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report, Campaign performance) -- reports only, no disapprovals or budget alerts. Standing issues still open from the last live scrape: conversions 0.00 for multiple consecutive days (tracking suspect), 'Oldest SB Brewery on Tap' PAUSED with all asset groups policy-limited, 'World Cup HQ 2026' PAUSED on Final day.

YELP: 2 emails in 24h, both consumer marketing blasts. Nothing actionable.

TRIPADVISOR: no ad report in 72h.

RESERVATIONS: Sun Jul 19 -- 10 guests across 2 confirmed 11:00 AM bookings (Ruju Patel 4; Jason Price 6 -- 'Two families coming together to watch the World Cup Final').

toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary (The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group, Fri Jul 17), email received Sat Jul 18 6:27 AM PT. LOCATION-level email (labor $, void $, dayparts, rooms) had not landed at run time. SDLW computed locally against the Fri Jul 10 GROUP email.
toast.note: PENDING at the 4 AM run -- Sat Jul 18 Daily Performance Summary had not been delivered (lands ~7:39 AM PT). Figures shown are LAST KNOWN: Fri Jul 17. Net $7,074.87 / Gross $7,274.25 / 282 guests / 163 orders / avg guest $25.09 / avg order $43.40 / labor 16.7%.

sling.note: Jul 19 daily report NOT yet delivered at the 4 AM run (lands ~7:00 AM PT). Showing LAST KNOWN: Sat Jul 18 -- 13 employees / 14 shifts / 76.98 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT. Today's actual staffing is unconfirmed.

slingLastKnown.note: TODAY (Sat Jul 18), email delivered 7:00 AM PT. 13 employees / 14 shifts / 76.98 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 0 off -- biggest day of the week and +16.8 hrs over Fri Jul 17's 60.16. TWO malformed 24-hour shifts again: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:31A-4:31A and Julianna Ornelas (Barista) 6:33A-6:33A. Note the second malformed shift moved from Casey Smith (GM) to Julianna -- the Sling entry bug is not tied to one person, so it is a schedule-entry pattern worth fixing at the source. Casey Smith is not on today's schedule. Julianna is double-booked (Barista AM + Runner 1:30-5P).

Billing Jul 1-17: spend $228.50, CPC $0.98, CPL $2.72 -- running ~$13.44/day. 12-mo ad contribution: 1,108 ad leads vs 728 organic (60/40), forecast 106. Bonus budget remaining is still not surfaced anywhere on the Yelp Ads dashboard -- 4th consecutive run; treat as unavailable rather than zero. Yelp Inbox shows 15 unread.
